title: amxx-builder manifest
description: Manifest file for the amxb build tool (amxx-builder)

name.description: Project name. Used as a {name} placeholder in archive_name and amxmodx_path.

version.description: Project version. Used as a {version} placeholder in archive_name. Can be overridden via --set version=X or the action 'version' input. Must be quoted in YAML to avoid number coercion (e.g. version: "1.0").

platform.description: Target deployment platform. Affects which amxmodx base package is downloaded for asset sources. Defaults to the host platform.

version.description: amxxpc compiler version to use. Format: major.minor.build (e.g. "1.10.5428"). Omit to use the latest available.

dir.description: Name of the amxmodx directory inside each repo (default: "amxmodx").

defines.description: Compiler preprocessor defines passed to all plugin compilations (e.g. ["DEBUG", "VERSION=1.2.3"]). Appended to defines from --define CLI flag.

token_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the GitHub PAT (default: "GITHUB_TOKEN").

ssh.description: Use SSH instead of HTTPS for git clone (default: false).

plugins_ini_postfix.description: Global postfix appended to generated plugins-<postfix>.ini filenames. Each repo gets its own INI file.

deps.description: Global include dependencies (.inc files) applied to all plugin compilations.

repos.description: GitHub repositories to pull AMX Mod X content from.

deploy.description: Local deploy settings. Defaults read from env vars (AMXB_DEPLOY_*). Values support ${VAR} interpolation.

path.description: Server root directory to deploy into. Falls back to $AMXB_DEPLOY_PATH.

amxmodx_path.description: Path relative to deploy.path where amxmodx content goes. Defaults to output.amxmodx_path.

assets_path.description: Path relative to deploy.path where assets go. Defaults to deploy root.

watch_debounce_ms.description: Milliseconds of file-write stability before triggering a watch rebuild (default: 500).

exclude.description: Paths relative to deploy.path to skip during deploy. Entire directory subtrees are excluded when a directory path is given. Useful for preserving default configs on the server.

rcon.description: GoldSrc (HL1/CS 1.6) UDP RCON settings. Falls back to AMXB_DEPLOY_RCON_* env vars.

command.description: RCON command to run after deploy. {plugin} is replaced with the plugin name. Falls back to $AMXB_DEPLOY_RCON_CMD. Leave empty to skip RCON.

plugins.description: Rules for filtering and categorizing local plugins (amxmodx/scripting/**/*.sma). Applies only to local plugins; repo plugins use their per-repo plugins_ini_postfix. First matching rule wins.

assets.description: Remote asset sources to include in the build.

on_conflict.description: How to handle duplicate files among remote sources. Local assets always win regardless of this setting (default: "last_wins").

dir.description: Directory to write the output archive or copied files (default: "./dist").

amxmodx_path.description: Path of the amxmodx directory inside the archive (default: "addons/amxmodx").

assets_path.description: Local directory whose contents are copied to the archive root alongside amxmodx_path.

readme.description: Include the project README.md in the archive root (default: false).

generate_ini.description: Generate plugins-*.ini files listing compiled plugins (default: true).

pack.description: Create a zip archive. Set to false to copy files to output.dir instead — useful for CI artifacts (default: true).

on_conflict.description: How to handle duplicate files when multiple repos provide the same path (default: "last_wins").

pluginRule.description: A rule matching local .sma files by glob pattern.

enabled.description: Set to false to skip compilation and deploy for matching plugins (default: true).

ini.description: plugins-*.ini postfix for matching plugins. Overrides the global plugins_ini_postfix. Set to false to compile but exclude from all INI files.

oneOf.description: Postfix for plugins-<ini>.ini. Empty string generates plugins.ini.
Compile but do not add to any INI file.

depEntry.description: An include dependency. Either a shorthand string or an object.

include_path.description: Path inside the repo or release asset where .inc files are located.

source.description: How to fetch the dependency: "git" clones the repo, "release" downloads a release asset (default: "git").

asset.description: For source=release: which release asset to download.

oneOf.description: Glob pattern matching the release asset filename (e.g. "*-include*.zip").
Zero-based index of the release asset.

repoEntry.description: A GitHub repository to include. Either a shorthand string or an object.

ref.description: Tag, branch, commit SHA, or "latest" (resolves to the latest GitHub release).

amxmodx_dir.description: Override the amxmodx directory name for this repo (defaults to manifest.amxmodx.dir).

plugins_ini_postfix.description: Override the INI postfix for this repo.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude when copying content from this repo.

exclude_files.description: Specific filenames to exclude from this repo.

deps_override.description: Explicit dep list for this repo, replacing the auto-detected DEPS_LIST file.

assetMapEntry.description: A single from→to mapping for an asset source.

from.description: Path inside the source (archive root or single file). Trailing slash means "take contents"; no trailing slash means "take the item itself". Omit to take everything.

to.description: Destination path in the asset tree. Trailing slash means "place inside this folder". Omit to place at asset root. For a single file without trailing slash, acts as a rename.

source.description:
Built-in source type:
- "local": local assets/ directory next to the manifest (included by default)
- "amxmodx": base amxmodx package (uses manifest.platform and amxmodx.version)
- "release": GitHub release asset, shares cache with deps (requires repo + ref)

repo.description: For source=release: GitHub repository in "owner/repo" format.

ref.description: For source=release: tag, or "latest" to resolve the latest GitHub release.

asset.description: For source=release: which release asset to download (same as deps asset selector).

oneOf.description: Glob pattern matching the asset filename.

url.description: URL of a file or archive to download. Supported: .zip, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2, and single files.

from.description: Path inside the source to extract. Shorthand for a single map entry. Trailing slash = take contents; no trailing slash = take the item itself.

to.description: Destination in the asset tree. Shorthand for a single map entry. Trailing slash = place inside folder; no trailing slash on single file = rename.

map.description: Multiple from→to extraction rules for this source. Takes precedence over top-level from/to.

cache.description:
Caching strategy for this source (default: "none").
- none: download to build/ on every build
- local: cache in .amxb-cache/ next to the manifest
- global: cache in the global amxx-builder cache directory
